languages.text: [Сочувственно улыбнуться] "Я вижу ты тоже когда-то любил и терял. Такова жизнь".
[Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."
languages.original_text: [Сочувственно улыбнуться] "Я вижу ты тоже когда-то любил и терял. Такова жизнь".

traits.locale_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."
[Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."
[Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

languages.text: [Sonreír de forma comprensiva] «Veo que usted también ha amado y perdido. Así es la vida».
languages.original_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

traits.locale_text: [Sonreír de forma comprensiva] «Veo que usted también ha amado y perdido. Así es la vida».

languages.text: 【露出同情的微笑】“看来你也经历过爱与失去。人生就是如此。”
languages.original_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

traits.locale_text: 【露出同情的微笑】“看来你也经历过爱与失去。人生就是如此。”

languages.text: [Sourire d'un air compatissant] « Je vois que vous aussi avez aimé et perdu quelqu'un. Ainsi va la vie. »
languages.original_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

traits.locale_text: [Sourire d'un air compatissant] « Je vois que vous aussi avez aimé et perdu quelqu'un. Ainsi va la vie. »

languages.text: [Sempatik bir şekilde gülümse] "Görüyorum ki sen de sevdiğini yitirmişsin. Hayat böyle işte."
languages.original_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

traits.locale_text: [Sempatik bir şekilde gülümse] "Görüyorum ki sen de sevdiğini yitirmişsin. Hayat böyle işte."

languages.text: ［同情を込めて微笑む］「君もまた、愛し、そして失った経験があるのだな。それが人生というものだ」
languages.original_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

traits.locale_text: ［同情を込めて微笑む］「君もまた、愛し、そして失った経験があるのだな。それが人生というものだ」

languages.text: [Freundlich lächeln] "Ich sehe, Ihr habt auch geliebt und verloren. So ist das Leben."
languages.original_text: [Smile sympathetically] "I see you, too, have loved and lost. Such is life."

traits.locale_text: [Freundlich lächeln] "Ich sehe, Ihr habt auch geliebt und verloren. So ist das Leben."
